About S.K. Solutions

Rooted in trust.
Driven by quality.

10+
Years of Service

S.K. Solutions is a trusted B2B chemical distribution company based in Sri Lanka, specialising in the supply of high-quality Glycerine and Propylene Glycol to the nation's key industrial sectors.

We serve manufacturers across the rubber, textile, personal care, food & beverage, pharmaceutical, and soap-making industries — providing consistent, reliable supply backed by full documentation and expert technical support.

Our commitment goes beyond delivering chemicals. We build long-term partnerships, understand your specific needs, and ensure every product meets the highest international quality standards.

🤝
Customer Focus
Long-term partnerships built on understanding your needs and delivering tailored solutions.
✅
Quality & Reliability
Premium-grade products from globally certified manufacturers, delivered on time, every time.
⚖️
Integrity & Compliance
Full transparency and strict adherence to all regulatory and ethical standards.
🛡️
Safety First
Proper handling, labelling and transportation — protecting people and communities.
Our Direction

Vision & Mission

The principles that guide every decision we make.

Our Vision
Leading with Purpose

To be the trusted and reliable partner to industry — delivering sustainable solutions that add value to our customers while maintaining a strong commitment to social and environmental responsibility.

Our Mission
Innovate. Partner. Sustain.

To deliver innovative chemical solutions to industry, building long-term partnerships with our customers while promoting sustainable practices and responsible care for society and the environment.

Our Product Range

Premium chemicals,
reliably delivered

Our two flagship products are available in multiple grades to meet the exact needs of every industry — with full SDS documentation included.

Flagship Product
Glycerine (Glycerol)
C₃H₈O₃ · CAS 56-81-5 · Clear, odourless viscous liquid

A naturally derived, versatile polyol widely used as a humectant, solvent, and emollient across personal care, pharmaceutical, food, soap, and industrial applications.

USP/BP Pharma FCC Food Grade Cosmetic Grade Industrial Grade
Key uses: Moisturisers · Soaps · Pharmaceuticals · Food Additives · Mouthwash · Rubber Processing
Flagship Product
Propylene Glycol (PG)
C₃H₈O₂ · CAS 57-55-6 · Clear, slightly sweet liquid

A synthetic diol used widely as a solvent, humectant, and carrier in pharmaceutical, food, and industrial applications. Low toxicity and excellent water absorption.

USP/EP Pharma FCC Food Grade Industrial Grade
Key uses: Food Additives · Medicines · Cosmetics · Antifreeze · Industrial Solvent · Personal Care
🌿
Formic Acid
Primary coagulant for natural rubber latex — efficiently converts liquid latex into solid rubber sheets at plantation level.
Rubber Processing
⚗️
Acetic Acid
Industrial grade for rubber coagulation, textile processing, and chemical synthesis across manufacturing sectors.
Rubber · Textile
🧪
Sodium Lauryl Sulphate
Premium surfactant and foaming agent for shampoos, body wash, toothpastes, and personal care formulations.
Personal Care · Soap
Sectors We Serve

Industries we proudly
support across Sri Lanka

Our products are trusted by manufacturers in six key sectors driving Sri Lanka's industrial economy.

🌳
Rubber & Latex
Coagulants and processing chemicals for natural rubber latex tapping, coagulation, and solid rubber sheet production at plantation and factory level.
Formic Acid · Acetic Acid · Glycerine
🧵
Textile & Garment
Softening agents, humectants, and processing chemicals for denim, cotton, and synthetic fabric dyeing, finishing, and conditioning.
Glycerine · Propylene Glycol · Acetic Acid
🧴
Personal Care & Cosmetics
Humectants, emollients, and solvent ingredients for shampoos, conditioners, body lotions, facial creams, and all cosmetic formulations.
Glycerine · Propylene Glycol · SLS
🍹
Food & Beverage
FCC food-grade Glycerine and Propylene Glycol as approved humectants, sweeteners, solvents, and preservatives in food and beverage manufacturing.
Glycerine FCC · Propylene Glycol FCC
💊
Pharmaceuticals
USP/BP pharma-grade excipients and solvents for tablet binding, syrup formulation, topical preparations, and pharmaceutical manufacturing.
Glycerine USP/BP · Propylene Glycol USP
🧼
Soap & Home Care
Glycerine as primary moisturising ingredient in transparent soaps, liquid soaps, shampoos, and home care cleaning product formulations.
Glycerine · SLS · Propylene Glycol
Sustainable
Chemical Distribution
Responsible · Safe · Eco-Friendly
Environmental Responsibility

Committed to a
greener tomorrow

At S.K. Solutions, sustainability is woven into every decision — from how we source products to how we deliver and handle them across Sri Lanka.

01
Responsible Sourcing
We partner exclusively with certified manufacturers who meet international environmental and quality standards.
02
Safe Handling & Transport
All chemicals stored, handled and transported in full compliance with local regulations and OSHA standards.
03
Full SDS Documentation
Every product delivered with complete Safety Data Sheets, Certificate of Analysis, and compliance papers.
04
Community Responsibility
We invest in communities through education, clean water initiatives, and environmental restoration.
100%
Regulatory Compliance
Zero
Environmental Incidents
Full
SDS on Every Product

Certified Supply Partners
